message:
fix(demo): sync CLI help screen list with ScreenId::ALL (bd-l8x9.5.4)

Add screen 14 (Responsive Demo) to the --help SCREENS section and
clarify keybinding descriptions. Add unit tests validating the help
screen count matches ScreenId::ALL.len().
